<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band11_chunk007.pdf#page=21 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band11 p340 -->

LANDKREIS EBERSBERG · FORSTINNING


[[File:Band11_chunk007_p021_img001.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band11_chunk007_p021_img002.jpg|thumb|Chorgewölbe: B Heimsuchung Mariens, in den Stichkappen Symbole]]
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band11 p341 -->
